# chronosphere_derived_label (Resource)

Defines a synthetic label whose value is derived from existing metric labels or trace span tags via mapping or constructed-value rules. The derived label can then be referenced in queries as if it were a real label on the source series.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `label_name` (String) Name of the label exposed on derived series. Must be unique across the system.
- `name` (String) Display name of the derived label. Can be changed after creation.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description of the derived label.
- `existing_label_policy` (String) Policy controlling behavior when the target label already exists on the source series (e.g. keep, replace).
- `metric_label` (Block List, Max: 1) Derives a label for metrics, either by constructing a new value from filters or by mapping an existing label. Mutually exclusive with `span_tag`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label))
- `slug` (String) Stable identifier for the derived label. Generated from `name` if omitted. Immutable after creation.
- `span_tag` (Block List, Max: 1) Derives a label for trace spans by mapping from an existing span tag. Mutually exclusive with `metric_label`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--span_tag))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--metric_label"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label`

Optional:

- `constructed_label` (Block List, Max: 1) Constructs the derived label value from a list of value definitions, each gated by a filter on existing labels. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--constructed_label))
- `mapping_label` (Block List, Max: 1) Derives the label value by mapping from an existing source label, optionally translating its values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label))

<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--constructed_label"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.constructed_label`

Required:

- `value_definitions` (Block List, Min: 1) Ordered list of value definitions. The first definition whose filters match produces the derived label value. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--constructed_label--value_definitions))

<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--constructed_label--value_definitions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.constructed_label.value_definitions`

Required:

- `filters` (Block List, Min: 1) Label filters that must all match for this value definition to apply. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--constructed_label--value_definitions--filters))
- `value` (String) Value assigned to the derived label when this definition's filters match.

<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--constructed_label--value_definitions--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.constructed_label.value_definitions.filters`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the label to match.
- `value_glob` (String) Glob pattern matched against the label value.




<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.mapping_label`

Optional:

- `name_mappings` (Block List) Ordered list of name mappings. The first mapping whose filters match supplies the derived label from its `source_label`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--name_mappings))
- `value_mappings` (Block List) Translations from source label values to a normalized target value. Each entry maps a set of source globs to a single target. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--value_mappings))

<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--name_mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.mapping_label.name_mappings`

Required:

- `filters` (Block List, Min: 1) Label filters that must all match for this name mapping to apply. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--name_mappings--filters))
- `source_label` (String) Source label on the ingested time series to copy into the derived label.

Optional:

- `value_mappings` (Block List) Translations from source label values to a normalized target value. Each entry maps a set of source globs to a single target. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--name_mappings--value_mappings))

<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--name_mappings--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.mapping_label.name_mappings.filters`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the label to match.
- `value_glob` (String) Glob pattern matched against the label value.


<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--name_mappings--value_mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.mapping_label.name_mappings.value_mappings`

Required:

- `source_value_globs` (List of String) Glob patterns matched against the source label value. A match maps the value to `target_value`.
- `target_value` (String) Value to assign on the derived label when any `source_value_globs` matches.



<a id="nestedblock--metric_label--mapping_label--value_mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metric_label.mapping_label.value_mappings`

Required:

- `source_value_globs` (List of String) Glob patterns matched against the source label value. A match maps the value to `target_value`.
- `target_value` (String) Value to assign on the derived label when any `source_value_globs` matches.




<a id="nestedblock--span_tag"></a>
### Nested Schema for `span_tag`

Optional:

- `name_mappings` (Block List) Ordered list of name mappings. The first mapping that matches supplies the derived label from its `source_tag`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--span_tag--name_mappings))

<a id="nestedblock--span_tag--name_mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `span_tag.name_mappings`

Required:

- `source_tag` (String) Source span tag name to copy into the derived label.
